headline: PHM Q1 Deep Dive: Incentives and Build-to-Order Shift Shape PulteGroup’s Transition Year
summary: Homebuilding company PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q1 CY2026, but sales fell by 12.4% year on year to $3.41 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $1.79 per share was 1% below analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Evercore ISI Group Maintains Outperform on PulteGroup, Raises Price Target to $151
summary: Evercore ISI Group  analyst Stephen Kim   maintains PulteGroup (NYSE:PHM) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $146 to $151.
